finance.heroDescription: Turn SEC filings, bank statements, and loan documents into structured records that reconciliation, underwriting, and compliance agents act on — without post-processing.
bulletPoints: Extract fields, tables, and line items from 10-Ks, bank statements, and loan packages.
Every value carries confidence scores, field lineage, and GAAP/IFRS mapping.
Exception routing sends only low-confidence extractions to human review.

workflows.heading: From documents to decisions — no manual data entry.
workflows.subheading: Every workflow starts with document extraction. Every extraction ends with agent-ready records.
workflows.creditUnderwritingDesc: Extract financial statements, tax returns, and bank statements into typed records. Agents calculate debt-service coverage ratios, verify income, and flag exceptions — all from structured data with field lineage.
workflows.accountsPayableDesc: Match invoices to purchase orders and payment records. Agents reconcile line items, detect discrepancies, and route exceptions to review queues — with full audit trails from source documents.
workflows.regulatoryComplianceDesc: Extract data from 10-Ks, 10-Qs, and regulatory filings into GAAP/IFRS-mapped structures. Compliance agents verify disclosures, check calculations, and generate audit-ready reports.
workflows.commercialLoanDesc: Process loan applications, credit memos, and collateral documents into structured records. Agents validate terms, calculate risk metrics, and route approvals — with evidence traces for every decision.

dataMapping.heading: 99% accuracy on financial Q&A. Not 25%.
dataMapping.description: Traditional RAG fails on financial questions because it guesses from embeddings. Our agentic data maps build entity graphs, field lineage, and retrieval-ready indexes — so agents navigate with precision, not similarity.
dataMapping.note1: The data map connects issuers to accounts to transactions — with every field traceable to its source coordinate (page, table, row, cell).
dataMapping.note2: This is the layer that separates keyword-matching from financial-grade retrieval: every query resolves to the correct entity, time period, and evidence trace.
dataMapping.traditionalRagDesc: Keyword matching on raw text — 25-30% accuracy on financial Q&A
dataMapping.kgRagDesc: Multi-hop reasoning over knowledge graphs — 65% accuracy, high construction cost
dataMapping.agenticSearchDesc: Multi-agent verification + entity graphs — 99% accuracy on financial benchmarks
dataMapping.financialReasoningDesc: Agents traverse entity graphs connecting issuers → accounts → transactions → obligations. No guesswork. Every relationship is explicit, typed, and traceable to source documents.
dataMapping.precisionRetrievalDesc: Route queries to exact fields, tables, and entities — with evidence traces. 'What was Q3 revenue?' resolves to page 12, table B, row 3, cell 4 — not a fuzzy text match.
dataMapping.reliableCalculationDesc: Anchor numerical operations to normalized, typed values with GAAP/IFRS mapping. Debt ratios, margin calculations, and trend analysis stay reliable because every number is traceable.

cta.heading: Built for regulated, data-heavy operations.
cta.seeItWork: See it work on your financial documents.

insurance.heroDescription: Turn ACORD forms, policy documents, and claims files into structured records that underwriting, claims, and compliance agents act on — without manual data entry.
bulletPoints: Extract fields, tables, and clauses from policies, claims, and medical records.
Every output includes confidence scores, field lineage, and regulatory mapping.
Exception routing sends ambiguous claims and edge cases to adjuster review.
insurance.documentTypesValue: ACORD forms · policies · claims · medical records

workflows.heading: From intake to adjudication — no manual data entry.
workflows.subheading: Every workflow starts with document extraction. Every extraction ends with agent-ready records.
workflows.claimsProcessingDesc: Extract claim forms, loss reports, and supporting documents into typed records. Agents validate coverage, calculate reserves, and route approvals — with evidence traces linking every decision to source documents.
workflows.underwritingDesc: Process applications, financial statements, and risk assessments into structured records. Agents score risk, verify disclosures, and flag exceptions — all from GAAP-mapped data with field lineage.
workflows.medicalRecordsDesc: Extract diagnoses, treatment histories, and billing codes from medical records and EOBs. Agents cross-reference claims against policy terms and flag inconsistencies for adjuster review.
workflows.policyAdminDesc: Parse policy documents, endorsements, and renewal packages into clause-mapped structures. Agents compare terms, detect coverage gaps, and generate compliance reports with full audit trails.

dataMapping.heading: 99% accuracy on claims data extraction. Not 25%.
dataMapping.description: Traditional RAG fails on insurance questions because it guesses from embeddings. Our agentic data maps build entity graphs, clause lineage, and retrieval-ready indexes — so agents navigate with precision, not similarity.
dataMapping.note1: The data map connects policyholders to claims to coverage terms — with every field traceable to its source coordinate (page, clause, section, paragraph).
dataMapping.note2: This is the layer that separates keyword-matching from insurance-grade retrieval: every query resolves to the correct policy, claim, and evidence trace.

traditionalRag.label: Traditional RAG
traditionalRag.value: Keyword matching on raw text — 25-30% accuracy on claims data extraction

kgRag.label: KG-RAG
kgRag.value: Multi-hop reasoning over knowledge graphs — 65% accuracy, high construction cost

agenticSearch.label: Agentic Search
agenticSearch.value: Multi-agent verification + entity graphs — 99% accuracy on insurance benchmarks

claimsReasoning.title: Claims Reasoning
claimsReasoning.description: Agents traverse entity graphs connecting policyholders → claims → coverage terms → obligations. No guesswork. Every relationship is explicit, typed, and traceable to source documents.

policyRetrieval.title: Policy Retrieval
policyRetrieval.description: Route queries to exact clauses, endorsements, and coverage terms — with evidence traces. 'What is the deductible for water damage?' resolves to policy section 4, clause B, paragraph 3 — not a fuzzy text match.

reserveCalculation.title: Reserve Calculation
reserveCalculation.description: Anchor numerical operations to normalized, typed values with regulatory mapping. Loss reserves, coverage limits, and premium calculations stay reliable because every number is traceable.

cta.heading: Built for claims, underwriting, and compliance.
cta.seeItWork: See it work on your insurance documents.

hero.description: Turn scenes, motion, camera intent, and temporal consistency into machine-readable datasets that agents can use to train and evaluate video models.
hero.vizDescription: Frames, motion vectors, prompts, and evaluation traces.
hero.outputValue: Dense labels across time and scene state

useCases.heading: From Film Production to Foley Sound Design.
useCases.subheading: Six research-backed use cases spanning cinematic generation, music video production, and automated annotation at scale.

items.title: Film & Cinematic Production
items.description: Multi-shot narrative, camera grammar, dialogue lip-sync, score annotation. Train models that understand scene continuity, shot composition, and audio-visual alignment across long-form content.

items.title: Music Video Generation
items.description: Beat-aligned visuals, lyric-to-lip-sync, song structure segmentation. Annotate temporal relationships between audio beats, visual transitions, and performer motion at frame level.

items.title: Foley & Sound Design
items.description: Action-sound correspondence, material labels, spatial audio, multi-track separation. Map every on-screen action to its acoustic signature with phoneme-level temporal precision.

items.title: Advertising & Commercial
items.description: Short-form generation, product scene understanding, multi-language dubbing. Annotate brand elements, camera control intent, and scene semantics for controllable commercial video.

items.title: Gaming & Interactive Media
items.description: Physics-aware motion, character consistency, environmental sound. Label dynamic interactions, procedural camera paths, and spatial audio for real-time generation models.

items.title: Training Pipeline at Scale
items.description: 100K+ hour automated pipelines, quality filtering, RLHF curation. End-to-end annotation infrastructure with multi-stage rejection, temporal alignment verification, and human-in-the-loop validation.

pipeline.heading: From raw footage to model-ready data in six stages.
pipeline.description: Automated MLLM pipelines scale to 100K+ hours with multi-stage quality filtering. Each stage rejects 15–60% of samples, ensuring only high-quality annotations reach training.
pipeline.rejectionRateValue: 70–80% filtered for quality across all pipeline stages.

stages.description: Raw video ingestion from production, web, and licensed sources
Audio presence, silence ratio (<80%), sampling rate (≥32kHz)
MLLM captioning, Whisper transcription, beat tracking, event detection
Sample-based QA (5–10%), edge case refinement, quality rating

compatibility.heading: One annotation framework. Every frontier model.
compatibility.description: Our 8-dimension annotation framework maps to every major video generation model — from vision-only architectures to full audio-visual systems. One labeling pass, every model covered.
compatibility.note1: Instead of re-annotating for each model's input format, our framework captures the superset of dimensions across Seedance, Veo, Sora, Kling, Wan, and HunyuanVideo.
compatibility.note2: This eliminates redundant labeling and ensures your training data investment scales across model generations.

summaryCards.label: Audio-First Models
summaryCards.value: Veo 3, Seedance — dialogue, music, and ambient annotation

summaryCards.label: Vision-First Models
summaryCards.value: Sora 2, Kling, Wan — scene, tracking, motion, camera

cta.heading: Built for the models that are building the future of video.
cta.seeItWork: See it work on your video training data.

hero.breadcrumb: Use Cases · Synthetic Data for Agent Training
hero.description: Every agentic capability — reasoning, coding, math, tool use, planning, and multimodal understanding — requires its own training data shape. We synthesize all six from seed prompts, with domain-specific verification built into every sample.

capabilityCards.label: Reasoning
capabilityCards.value: CoT traces · critique loops · evidence graphs

capabilityCards.label: Tool calling
capabilityCards.value: Schema-safe actions · state tracking · API validation

capabilityCards.label: Multimodal
capabilityCards.value: GUI grounding · visual QA · cross-modal reasoning

grid.heading: Each Capability Needs Its Own Training Data Shape.
grid.description: Reasoning traces look nothing like tool-calling trajectories. Code execution data requires sandbox verification. Planning data needs replanning branches. We handle the structural differences so you don't have to.

items.title: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
items.subtitle: Teach models to think step by step
items.description: Generate multi-step reasoning traces with critique loops, evidence graphs, and self-correction paths. Models trained on these traces learn to decompose problems, verify intermediate steps, and recover from logical errors.
items.methods: Self-Instruct · STaR · Process Reward Models · Rejection Sampling
items.output: Verified CoT traces with evidence links and confidence scores

items.title: Code Generation & Repair
items.subtitle: Execution-verified samples with tests and patches
items.description: Synthesize code problems, solutions, test suites, and failure recovery paths. Every sample executes in a sandbox — if the code doesn't run, it doesn't ship. Covers repo-level tasks, rare languages, and self-correction loops.
items.output: Runnable code with test suites, patches, and execution logs

items.title: Mathematical Reasoning
items.subtitle: Symbolic proofs with formal verification
items.description: Evolve seed problems through rephrasing, reversal, and difficulty scaling. Each solution carries symbolic steps, intermediate checkpoints, and formal verification. Supports curriculum learning from arithmetic to competition-level proofs.
items.methods: MetaMath · NuminaMath · DeepSeekMath · GRPO · Theorem Proving
items.output: Grounded numeric chains with step-level verification
items.metricLabel: math training samples from seed evolution

items.title: Tool Calling & Function Use
items.subtitle: Schema-safe trajectories with state tracking
items.description: Synthesize multi-turn tool-calling scenarios with ambiguous intents, shifting goals, and execution failures. LLMs act as environment simulators, generating coherent API responses and state transitions. Agents learn when to clarify, act, or revise.
items.methods: APIGen · ToolACE · BUTTON · TOUCAN · Environment Simulation
items.output: Validated tool-use trajectories with schema checks

items.title: Long-Horizon Planning
items.subtitle: Trajectory synthesis for multi-step workflows
items.description: Generate planning data that teaches models to decompose goals, maintain memory, and dynamically replan on failure. Plan-and-Act pipelines retroactively annotate successful trajectories with high-level plans. AgentGen invents diverse environments and tasks.
items.output: Grounded plan-action pairs with replanning branches

items.title: Multimodal & GUI Agents
items.subtitle: Visual grounding with cross-modal reasoning
items.description: Synthesize GUI navigation tasks, visual document comprehension, and cross-modal reasoning data. Knowledge graph frameworks like Graph2Eval generate multi-hop web interaction tasks. Supports VLMs, robotic VLA models, and RL in synthetic worlds.
items.methods: Graph2Eval · VL-DAC · GUI Grounding · Knowledge Graph Sampling
items.output: Spatial-aware interaction traces with visual-textual links

pipeline.heading: Seed → Evolve → Synthesize → Verify → Export.
pipeline.description: One pipeline serves all six capabilities. The verification layer adapts per modality — sandbox execution for code, formal proofs for math, schema checks for tool calls, consensus voting for reasoning.

steps.label: Seed
steps.detail: Domain prompts, policies, existing datasets, or task definitions

steps.label: Evolve
steps.detail: Evol-Instruct generates harder, easier, and constraint-varied samples

steps.label: Synthesize
steps.detail: Compound AI agents generate reasoning traces, code, math, tool calls

steps.label: Verify
steps.detail: Sandbox execution, formal proofs, schema checks, multi-model consensus

steps.label: Export
steps.detail: JSON-L, Parquet, HuggingFace — ready for SFT, RLHF, or evaluation

pipeline.qualityHeading: Four Quality Dimensions Built Into Every Sample.

qualityDimensions.title: Diversity
qualityDimensions.description: Clustering-based metrics ensure semantic coverage across the full problem space. Prevents model collapse from narrow distributions.

qualityDimensions.title: Verifiability
qualityDimensions.description: Execution-based filtering in sandboxes, formal proof validation, and multi-model consensus voting. Hallucinated samples never reach training.

qualityDimensions.title: Difficulty Adaptation
qualityDimensions.description: Bidirectional evolution scales from trivial to expert-level. Dynamic difficulty adjusts to the model's current solvability frontier.

qualityDimensions.title: Long-Context Coherence
qualityDimensions.description: Document-grounded tasks and multi-turn simulations maintain logical consistency over massive token lengths. No context drift.

comparison.heading: One Pipeline, Six Verification Strategies.
comparison.description: Each capability maps to a specific generation method, verification strategy, scale target, and output format. The pipeline adapts — the quality bar doesn't.

footerCards.label: Infrastructure
footerCards.value: HuggingFace · Weights & Biases · NVIDIA NeMo · Vertex AI

footerCards.label: Compliance
footerCards.value: PII filtering · toxicity checks · deduplication · domain alignment

cta.heading: Train your agent on synthetic data that actually runs.
cta.description: Tell us which capabilities your agent needs — reasoning, code, math, tool calling, planning, or multimodal — and we'll generate execution-verified training datasets in your preferred format.

footerCards.label: Formats
footerCards.value: JSON-L · Parquet · HuggingFace Datasets · Custom schemas

footerCards.label: Delivery
footerCards.value: API access · S3/GCS export · HuggingFace Hub · Direct integration

footerCards.label: Response
footerCards.value: Pilot datasets within 48 hours · Full production in 2 weeks
